speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: What's happening now
questions: What is the weather like right now?
What are you doing at the moment?
Is anyone in your house cooking right now?
speaking.sampleAnswer: It is sunny right now. At the moment, I am talking to you. Yes, my mother is cooking dinner right now.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Changes around you
questions: Are prices increasing in your city?
Is your neighbourhood changing a lot?
Are more shops opening near you?
speaking.sampleAnswer: Yes, prices are increasing a little. My neighbourhood is changing a lot. Yes, more shops are opening near my house.
